% fig_lec04_curve.tex — Smooth curve C : R → M for Lecture 4
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec03_charts.jl
%
% C(t) = (t, 0.7·sin(0.9·t), h(t, 0.7·sin(0.9·t)))   for t ∈ [-1.8, 1.8]
% Tangent vector T = dC/dt at t = 0 is shown.

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  % ── LEFT: real line R with marked t ───────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=Rt,
      width=3.4cm, height=1.6cm,
      axis lines=middle,
      axis line style={birrenorange, line width=0.6pt,
                       -{Stealth[length=5pt,width=3pt]}},
      xmin=-1.4, xmax=1.4, ymin=-0.3, ymax=0.3,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty,
      xlabel={}, ylabel={},
      clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      coordinates {(0,0)};
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=birrenorange] at (axis cs:1.25,0.18) {$\R$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:0.0,0.04) {$t$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── RIGHT: M with curve C(t) and tangent T ────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=M,
      at={($(Rt.east)+(2.0cm,-0.5cm)$)}, anchor=west,
      width=7.5cm, height=5.2cm,
      view={-28}{35},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none, xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty, clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_surface.dat};

    % The curve
    \addplot3[munsell, line width=1.3pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_curve_M.dat};

    % Tangent vector T at C(0)
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]},
      banana!70!black, line width=1.0pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec03_charts_curve_tangent.dat};

    % Point p = C(0)
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec03_charts_curve_point.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet] at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black] at (axis cs:-0.25,0.15,0.55) {$p$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=munsell] at (axis cs:1.8,1.4,0.3) {$C$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black] at (axis cs:1.05,0.8,0.3) {$T$};
  \end{axis}

  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=7pt,width=4pt]}, cgblue]
    ($(Rt.east)+(0.05,0)$) -- ($(M.west)+(-0.05,0.5)$)
    node[midway, above, font=\small, text=cgblue]{$C$};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
